text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I enter this space—its modern, almost clinical design exudes potential, as though knowledge and discovery are waiting quietly behind the glass. Stepping closer, the R+D wall stirs my curiosity further. I am struck by the tension between creative energy and careful intention; this room is dedicated to the thoughtful development of ideas, and invites me to reflect on how humans innovate, connect, and coexist with technology. I feel quietly inspired by the promise of shared exploration, and I am reminded that every new idea emerges from spaces such as this.
